name: agent-booster-pack-contract-first
description: Manual Interface Design Gate workflow for Pi plus contract-first skill: approve contract/API shape before implementation lands.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-contract-first && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-contract-first -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
